Let us see what are the data structure required. See this is the graphical representation of a graph this is having multiple stages there are four stages and what is the data structure required. We require a cost adjacency matrix representing the cost of the edges. There are 1 to 8 vertices but the array starts from 0 onward so I have taken size as 9 that is 0 to 8. So first row and first column will be all zeros. So there are three arrays here cost and the D is for minimum distance in the path.
